changes.description: Dashboard labels now show more useful details.
changes.details: Raid, daily, weekly, calendar event, Argeos, and gold labels now open compact popups with clearer progress, availability, and focus behavior.

changes.description: Weekly gold progress handles difficulty mismatches better.
changes.details: Planned and cleared difficulty mismatches now show both lost gold and bonus gold. Extra bonus gold no longer hides still-open planned gold.

changes.description: Icons and images now load from bundled app assets.
changes.details: The app now uses the new bundled assets folder for icons and images instead of the old static images folder.

changes.description: Dashboard daily and raid summaries are more accurate.
changes.details: Completed lazy dailies now count correctly for the current reset, and non-gold tracked raids are included as additional raid progress.
The welcome screen now uses the current app icon and can be dragged with the custom title bar.
General settings now include app themes. Outlaw remains the default, with Alchemist, Void Space, Sidereal Gold, and Powi available as alternate styles.

changes.description: The app now uses a custom header.
changes.details: The native title bar was replaced with a tighter in-app header that includes drag support and window controls for minimize, maximize, and close.

changes.description: Set-Up Guide now covers more features.
changes.details: The Set-Up Guide now walks through Dashboard, Roster, Tracking, Raid settings, To Do, Marketplace, MeowConnect, System options, Updates, and the hidden Progression workspace. Guide highlights now use a distinct color and move away from the controls they explain.
General settings now include an optional Tuesday reminder for 1730+ characters that have Cube tracked but unfinished before weekly reset.

changes.description: Settings pages are easier to scan.
changes.details: Raid, Tracking, Roster, and System settings received tighter layouts, shared controls, clearer row actions, and more consistent character header details.
The guide now explains Sync now, first uploads, friend requests, groups and tags, Raid Together, and expanded profile details.

changes.description: Dashboard and To Do labels are more consistent.
changes.details: Mixed raid difficulties, character details, gold markers, and shared matrix headers now use more consistent styling and behavior across Dashboard, To Do, Tracking, and Raid settings.
The update changelog date display now uses day.month.year, custom window controls have the required Tauri permissions, and the app startup/logging path is quieter while keeping useful diagnostics.
